title: IndusInd Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IndusInd Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!
